forge-build-gate.description: Verify project compiles with Forge, attempt fix if failed

check.name: Forge Build Check
check.description: Run forge build and check for errors
check.prompt: rm -f magic/BUILD_FAILED.txt && forge build -o out --build-info 2>&1 | tee magic/build-output.log || (mkdir -p magic && echo 'BUILD_FAILED' > magic/BUILD_FAILED.txt)

fix.name: Forge Build Fix
fix.prompt: Run 'forge build -o out' to verify the code compiles successfully. If there are compilation errors, fix them and run 'forge build -o out' again until the code compiles without errors.

onFailure.name: Generate Failure Report
onFailure.description: Generate a user-readable failure report when gate fails
onFailure.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/generate-failure-report.md. Run exclusively the generate-failure-report agent to create magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md explaining what failed and how to fix it.

echidna-run-gate.description: Run Echidna and verify it completes successfully, attempt fix if failed

check.name: Run Echidna
check.description: Run Echidna to test the fuzzing setup and save logs
check.prompt: rm -rf echidna/*.txt 2>/dev/null; (echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --test-limit 50000 --disable-slither --test-mode exploration 2>&1 | tee magic/echidna-output.log) || true; mkdir -p magic/logs && (find . -name '*.txt' -path '*/echidna/*' -exec cp {} magic/logs/ \; 2>/dev/null || true)

fix.name: Fix Echidna Failure
fix.description: Resolve issues preventing Echidna from running successfully
fix.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/fix-echidna-failures.md. Exclusively run the fix-echidna-failures agent using the Task tool. This agent will analyze the saved Echidna logs and implement fixes to resolve the issues.

onFailure.name: Generate Failure Report
onFailure.description: Generate a user-readable failure report when gate fails
onFailure.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/generate-failure-report.md. Run exclusively the generate-failure-report agent to create magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md explaining what failed and how to fix it.
